nasb.text: Then David inquired of the Lord, saying, “Shall I go up against the Philistines? Will You give them into my hand?” And the Lord said to David, “Go up, for I will certainly give the Philistines into your hand.”

esv.text: And David inquired of the Lord, “Shall I go up against the Philistines? Will you give them into my hand?” And the Lord said to David, “Go up, for I will certainly give the Philistines into your hand.”

cnv.text: 大衛求問耶和華說：“我可以上去攻打非利士人嗎？你會把他們交在我手裡嗎？”耶和華對大衛說：“你可以上去，我必把非利士人交在你手裡。”

ccb.text: 大卫求问耶和华：“我可以去迎战非利士人吗？你会把他们交在我手里吗？”耶和华说：“去吧，我必把他们交在你手里。”
